emails.subject: Financial Trading Agreement Database
emails.body: Financial Trading Agreement Database Sara suggested I email you and request access to the Financial Trading Agreement Database so I can better track the status of ISDA negotiations with my hedge fund clients. Can take care of that for me? Thanks. Per
